components.cards: bg-white border border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(45,44,42,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
components.buttons_primary: bg-[#4A6741] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#3D5636] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4A6741] focus:ring-offset-2
components.buttons_secondary: bg-[#F9F8F6] text-[#2D2C2A] border border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#E5E0D8] transition-colors
components.inputs: w-full border border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 bg-[#F9F8F6] focus:bg-white focus:border-[#4A6741] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#4A6741] transition-all text-[#2D2C2A]

login_background.description: Abstract geometric earthy background for login screen

login.layout: Split screen: Left 50% for login form (white bg, centered), Right 50% for hero image (login_background) with absolute text overlay 'Shared living, simplified'.
login.elements: Email/password inputs, login button, register link.

dashboard.header: Sticky glassmorphism header (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl), logo on left, current user profile on right.
dashboard.summary_section: Bento grid top row: 'Total Group Expenses (Current Month)', 'My Share', 'I Owe / I Am Owed'. Use large typography (text-4xl) for numbers. Currency is Indian Rupee (₹).
dashboard.expense_feed: List of recent expenses. Card format with icon (Phosphor), title, category, date, payer, amount. Include Edit/Delete actions in a dropdown menu (Shadcn).
dashboard.split_view: Visual bar or pie chart showing expense breakdown by category (Food, Utilities, Rent, Groceries, Entertainment).
dashboard.add_expense_modal: Shadcn Dialog. Form inputs: Title, Amount (₹), Category (Select), Payer (Current user fixed), Participants (Multi-checkbox for custom split).

testing_requirements.data_testid: All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., login-submit-button, add-expense-button, expense-item-edit-button).

developer_instructions.2: Avoid using default Shadcn styling blindly. Override card backgrounds to white, borders to #E5E0D8, and apply generous padding (p-6/p-8).
developer_instructions.3: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the dashboard layout (Bento grid) to allow exact control over spacing.
developer_instructions.4: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use #2D2C2A for main text.
developer_instructions.5: Do not implement placeholder media. Use the exact URLs provided in this JSON.
developer_instructions.6: Currency formatting must strictly use ₹ symbol and Indian number system (e.g., ₹ 1,50,000).
